events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need reason. Scenario: photo too far away to read bar deformation patterns or count ribs, no scale reference, drawings specify different bar sizes top/bottom. Need determine if bar size compliance can be confirmed. No, cannot confirm from evidence. Decision: needs_more_info (since cannot verify, not necessarily fail? The instructions: If work is dangerous or non-compliant, decision must be fail. Here evidence insufficient to confirm compliance; not confirmed non-compliant. So needs_more_info. Risk: high? Because wrong bar size would be structural critical; but currently unverified. Could be high. Work_stage rough-complete. component_conditions none flagged -> empty list. percent_complete maybe 80? Value? No numeric reading; maybe 0. confidence? We can state needed measurement. References ACI 315? Actually ACI 117 tolerances for placement; bar size verification requires reading markings or measuring diameter/cross-sectional area. Need close-up photo or caliper measurement, compare to mill marks/deformation count, or use bar gauge. Findings: bar size cannot be verified from provided photo due to lack of scale and inability to read deformations. Actions: obtain close-up photos with scale or field measure bar diameter/gauge, verify against placing drawings/submittals, inspect mill marks before concrete placement. Rationale brief. Need valid JSON.

The distant, unscaled photo provides none of these, so compliance cannot be confirmed.","references":["ACI 117 - reinforcement placement tolerances and inspection requirements","Project placing drawings and approved submittals for bar sizes"]}
